languages.text: С Заркова пришли тревожные вести. Некий враг вероломно напал на колонию, угрожая представителям Человечества на планете.
Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening Humanity's forces on the planet.
languages.original_text: С Заркова пришли тревожные вести. Некий враг вероломно напал на колонию, угрожая представителям Человечества на планете.

traits.locale_text: Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening Humanity's forces on the planet.
Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening to destroy Humanity's presence on the planet.
Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening to destroy Humanity's presence on the planet.
Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening Humanity's forces on the planet.

languages.text: ザルコフから不穏な知らせが届いた。ある敵が裏切り行為でコロニーを襲撃し、人類の惑星における存在を脅かしている。
languages.original_text: Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening to destroy Humanity's presence on the planet.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフから不穏な知らせが届いた。ある敵が裏切り行為でコロニーを襲撃し、人類の惑星における存在を脅かしている。

languages.text: Llegan noticias perturbadoras desde Zarkov. Cierto enemigo ha atacado la colonia a traición y amenaza las fuerzas de la Humanidad en el planeta.
languages.original_text: Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening Humanity's forces on the planet.

traits.locale_text: Llegan noticias perturbadoras desde Zarkov. Cierto enemigo ha atacado la colonia a traición y amenaza las fuerzas de la Humanidad en el planeta.

languages.text: Beunruhigende Nachrichten haben uns von Zarkov erreicht. Ein Feind hat die Kolonie angegriffen und droht, die Kräfte der Menschheit auf dem Planeten auszulöschen.
languages.original_text: Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening Humanity's forces on the planet.

traits.locale_text: Beunruhigende Nachrichten haben uns von Zarkov erreicht. Ein Feind hat die Kolonie angegriffen und droht, die Kräfte der Menschheit auf dem Planeten auszulöschen.

languages.text: Des nouvelles inquiétantes sont parvenues de Zarkov. Un ennemi a attaqué la colonie, menaçant d'éradiquer les troupes de l'humanité sur la planète.
languages.original_text: Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening Humanity's forces on the planet.

traits.locale_text: Des nouvelles inquiétantes sont parvenues de Zarkov. Un ennemi a attaqué la colonie, menaçant d'éradiquer les troupes de l'humanité sur la planète.

languages.text: 扎尔科夫传来令人不安的消息。一股敌对势力背信弃义，袭击了殖民地，威胁着人类在该行星上的武装力量。
languages.original_text: Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening Humanity's forces on the planet.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫传来令人不安的消息。一股敌对势力背信弃义，袭击了殖民地，威胁着人类在该行星上的武装力量。

languages.text: Zarkov'dan rahatsız edici haberler geldi. Bir düşman, koloniye haince saldırarak İnsanlığın gezegendeki kuvvetlerini tehdit ediyor.
languages.original_text: Disturbing tidings have come from Zarkov. A certain enemy has treacherously attacked the colony, threatening Humanity's forces on the planet.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov'dan rahatsız edici haberler geldi. Bir düşman, koloniye haince saldırarak İnsanlığın gezegendeki kuvvetlerini tehdit ediyor.
